question: 请探究 Dorea、Eubacterium 和 Bacteroides 这三种微生物群中哪些与生猪饲养效率显著相关，并阐明调控这些微生物群的基因及其代谢通路。

query_1.description: 与生猪饲养效率显著相关的微生物群
query_1.cypher_query: match (s:MicrobiotaName)-[r:significantly_associated]->(o:FE{name:"FE"}) where s.name in ["Dorea","Eubacterium","Bacteroides"] return s

query_2.description: 调控Dorea，Eubacterium，Bacteroides的基因
query_2.sql_query: Select Distinct gene_symbol,relationship from has_expression_change_results_by_microbiota hecrbm join gutmgene.gut_microbiota_gene_change_results gmmgr where hecrbm.`index` = gmmgr.`index` and hecrbm.relationship in ('Dorea','Eubacterium', 'Bacteroides')

question: 请识别在ketogenic low carbohydrate high fat diet饮食干预下丰度显著上升的肠道微生物群，分析能够抑制这些微生物群生长的关键基因，并进一步阐明这些基因参与的主要代谢通路。

query_1.description: 给ketogenic low carbohydrate high fat diet食物导致肠道微生物丰度上升的微生物
query_1.sql_query: Select microbiota_name from gutmdisorder.food_gut_microbiota_change_results fgmcr join relationship.has_abundance_change_results_by_food hacrbf where hacrbf.`index` = fgmcr.`index` and fgmcr.Alteration = 'increase' and relationship = 'ketogenic low carbohydrate high fat diet'

query_2.description: 能够减少这些微生物数量的基因表达
query_2.sql_query: Select Distinct gene_symbol,relationship from has_expression_change_results_by_microbiota hecrbm join gutmgene.gut_microbiota_gene_change_results gmgcr where hecrbm.`index` = gmgcr.`index` and gmgcr.Alteration = 'decrease' and relationship in ('Bacteroides','Dorea sp.')

results: hsa01521 EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitor resistance, hsa01522 Endocrine resistance, hsa01524 Platinum drug resistance, hsa04064 NF-kappa B signaling pathway, hsa04066 HIF-1 signaling pathway, hsa04071 Sphingolipid signaling pathway, hsa04115 p53 signaling pathway, hsa04140 Autophagy - animal,

question: 请识别药物Metformin干预下丰度显著上升的肠道微生物群，分析能够抑制这些微生物群生长的关键基因，并进一步阐明这些基因参与的主要代谢通路。

query_1.description: 使用药物Metformin导致肠道微生物丰度上升的微生物
query_1.sql_query: Select microbiota_name from gutmdisorder.drug_gut_microbiota_change_results fgmcr join relationship.has_abundance_change_results_by_drug hacrbf where hacrbf.`index` = fgmcr.`index` and fgmcr.Alteration = 'increase' and relationship = 'Metformin'

query_2.description: 能够增加这些微生物数量的基因表达
query_2.sql_query: Select Distinct gene_symbol,relationship from has_expression_change_results_by_microbiota hecrbm join gutmgene.gut_microbiota_gene_change_results gmgcr where hecrbm.`index` = gmgcr.`index` and gmgcr.Alteration = 'increase' and relationship in ('Akkermansia muciniphila','Bifidobacterium','Akkermansia')

results: mmu04927 Cortisol synthesis and secretion, mmu04934 Cushing syndrome

question: 请识别在药物Insulin Aspart干预下丰度显著上升的肠道微生物群，分析能够促进这些微生物群生长的关键基因，并进一步阐明这些基因参与的主要代谢通路。

query_1.description: 使用药物Insulin Aspart导致肠道微生物丰度上升的微生物
query_1.sql_query: Select microbiota_name from gutmdisorder.drug_gut_microbiota_change_results fgmcr join relationship.has_abundance_change_results_by_drug hacrbf where hacrbf.`index` = fgmcr.`index` and fgmcr.Alteration = 'increase' and relationship = 'Insulin Aspart'

query_2.description: 能够增加Enterobacteriaceae数量的基因表达
query_2.sql_query: Select Distinct gene_symbol,relationship from has_expression_change_results_by_microbiota hecrbm join gutmgene.gut_microbiota_gene_change_results gmgcr where hecrbm.`index` = gmgcr.`index` and gmgcr.Alteration = 'increase' and relationship in ('Enterobacteriaceae')
